result.result:
## This week on agent-office (Apr 13–18)

Week started with Phase 1–4 foundation commits (Apr 13) and ended with the unified-memory launch wizard (Apr 18).

**Engine + Office UI (Apr 13–14)**
- Extracted the pixel-agents engine into modular TS packages: constants/types (`a88a3c6`), sprites (`54fcd13`), floors/walls (`00cdc7b`), layout (`9df83eb`), core state/renderer (`769983d`), browser asset loader (`fd62f21`).
- Shipped the Office dashboard: 25×20 default layout with 7 themed zones (`a4ef81e`), `OfficeCanvas` React wrapper (`c8c8f57`), 3-column dashboard shell (`68467b0`), wired into the app (`6ac04c0`), zone labels (`c818ff3`), persona-to-seat pinning (`48daeac`), coord-transform fix (`b1ca00b`).
- Replaced placeholder squares with pixel-art sprites (`69510ec`); iTerm2 spawn on launch (`64ed75e`).

**Memory + launcher (Apr 13–14)**
- Phase 3 Memory Engine (`ca066d7`) — domain-scoped queries, injector, importer.
- Read-only claude-mem SQLite adapter (`d109f26`) + heuristic persona filter (`e079b4f`), auto-connect on boot (`3842a50`), injected into launcher with preview() (`1c875a4`).
- `LaunchPreview` flow: API preview route (`acdddfa`), store actions (`a0549e3`), component (`27cb1d3`), picker opens preview instead of launching (`c0f0d86`), readability fixes (`91ae92e`).

**Telemetry + provider-neutral history (Apr 15–16)**
- Phase 5 telemetry dashboard merged (`3199451`, `2534692`), provider adapters + portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), UTC anchoring fix (`c1a2dc7`).
- Provider-neutral project history ingestion (`9c4afb4`), `doctor` command (`3b9f1a9`), Codex history fixes (`fc03de3`, `1b6fbb5`), live-session presence stabilization (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`).

**Unified memory + brief (Apr 18 — today)**
- Persona-scoped memory brief generator (`4d9a58a`), wired into live launch (`17bf243`), rendered in LaunchPreview (`ec56fb9`).
- Dropped claude-mem fallback; unified stats + semantic search exposed via `/api/memories`, `/personas`, `/projects` (`2dbef00`) — test file trimmed from ~63 lines of mock plumbing.
- Persona memory stats + semantic search in project picker (`3c1cf94`).
- Collapsed `ProjectPicker` (600 lines) + `LaunchPreview` (481 lines) into a single `LaunchWizard.jsx` (798 lines) with 4 next-next steps (`3b6c0b4`).
- Added `sqlite-vec`, `@huggingface/transformers`, `playwright` (`0c3dfbd`); benchmark harness for brief-vs-raw-memory token savings (`40c5014`); LinkedIn carousel capture via Playwright (`01f2a70`); README rewrite around unified-memory USP (`18e1cbb`).

**Uncertain / not shipped**
- `bench/` directory and `scripts/bench-aggregate.mjs`, `bench-judge.mjs`, `bench-whitepaper.mjs` are **untracked on main** — the whitepaper benchmark runs exist locally but are not committed. Whether results have been written up anywhere outside the working tree, I can't confirm from git alone.
- The `40c5014` "harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings" commit landed, but I haven't verified which of the untracked scripts predate it vs. were added after — would need to diff against the commit to say precisely.
- Simplification of the office floor to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer (`d5da889`) landed today, but I didn't inspect the diff to confirm which zones were removed.
